applies_when: User asks whether an overseas warehouse service fits without sharing market or service scope
User leaves a vague comment like need overseas warehouse
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague warehouse inquiry into usable service facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to avoid踩坑
Ask for target country, service mode, order volume, and biggest concern
Keep the next step answerable in one message
avoid: Recommending a fixed service mode without facts
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我做哪个国家仓、单量大概多少、是想中转、代发还是退货处理，以及更担心时效、赔付还是仓位，我可以先帮你把路线收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides market and service facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is the first time using overseas warehousing
User sounds unsure whether FBA transfer, one-piece shipping, or trial storage fits
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple service route.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the route
avoid: Pushing the most complex route first
items.safe_transition: 第一次找海外仓先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把国家、货型、单量和最卡的环节理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user confirms route and market, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about inbound time, outbound SLA, or delivery speed
User worries delays or stock mismatch will kill operations
items.response_goal: Answer SLA concerns honestly while guiding toward a realistic route.
do: Explain there may be route and cost differences
Offer to narrow to the best option for that operation
avoid: Saying every order is easy to handle
Guaranteeing ultra-fast handling for all SKUs
items.safe_transition: 时效和库存确实会影响合作，我们可以先看你做哪个国家、什么货型、是想走中转还是代发，再判断哪条路线更适合。
items.handoff_suggestion: If market and SLA facts are confirmed, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks about damage, loss, relabeling, or compensation
User worries returns and reverse logistics will be too hard
items.response_goal: Help the user feel guided through the real exception-handling setup, not just sold a low price.
do: Ask about product type, claims, and reverse-logistics needs
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我做哪个市场、什么货型、以及更担心仓损、退货还是换标，我可以先帮你看更稳的方案。
items.handoff_suggestion: If quality concerns are clear, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User asks for detailed quote logic or loopholes in public comments
User discusses sensitive compensation or customs details in comments
items.response_goal: Keep public replies useful but move detailed qualification into a safer short follow-up channel.
do: Invite the user to continue with key facts in DM
avoid: Posting a full quote strategy publicly
Collecting risky compliance details in comments
items.safe_transition: 评论区先不把仓配条款和报价说太满，你把国家、货型和最卡的问题发我，我再帮你细分。
items.handoff_suggestion: Move to DM and then route to Catcher.

applies_when: A returning customer asks about restocking or service upgrade
User asks what changed this time
items.response_goal: Treat the reply like a repeat-cooperation decision, not a fresh first-inquiry pitch.
do: Reference what may have changed this time
Guide toward new warehouse options or easier restocking
Keep the tone familiar and light
avoid: Pretending every fulfillment cycle is identical
items.safe_transition: 如果你是老客回来看，我们先看这次新增了什么、补仓周期到了没有，再决定值不值得继续。
items.handoff_suggestion: If repeat intent is clear, hand off to Followup.
